title: Error with wwLib.wwFormula.getValue in published environment
symptom: Users encounter 'wwLib.wwFormula.getValue is not a function' when trying to log in after publishing their project. The error does not appear in testing mode.
root_cause: The error arises due to a missing update in the Xano plugins that affects the functionality of the wwLib.wwFormula.getValue method in the published environment. This issue is not present in the testing mode because the editor uses a different context.
fix_steps: Check if the error persists after republishing
agent_instruction: Re-publish the project to resolve the wwLib.wwFormula.getValue error.
